actions.description:
### If you think this is incorrect

If you have already had this vaccination or your personal details are wrong, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/).

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the COVID-19 vaccine

suitabilityRules.ruleText:
### Getting the vaccine

We believe you live in a setting where care is provided.

Speak to a member of staff where you live about getting the COVID-19 vaccine.
